name: Larry Webb
bio: Larry Webb serves as the Upshur County Sheriff, providing law enforcement services to Upshur County from the county seat of Gilmer. Sheriff Webb oversees patrol, criminal investigations, and detention operations while keeping the East Texas Yamboree community safe.
campaignPromises: Maintain strong law enforcement presence across Upshur County
Support school safety programs in all county school districts
Ensure efficient and humane county jail operations
Foster positive community relations through outreach events
